pid.executiveSummary: Based on the activity log, the team is driving stability improvements across Design, Workflow, Data Science, QA, Frontend. The program focuses on consistent quality, risk reduction, and operational maturity.
pid.problemStatement: Frequent stability work across multiple systems suggests recurring production risk and inconsistent operational readiness.
pid.businessCaseExpectedValue: Reducing incidents and operational friction will decrease support costs, improve uptime, and accelerate delivery cadence.

Reduce incidents in workflow area by 30%

objectivesSmart.objective: Improve data science stability and throughput
objectivesSmart.successMeasure: Reduce incidents in data science area by 30%
Reduce incidents in qa area by 30%
Reduce incidents in frontend area by 30%

assumptions: Activity log is representative of current work patterns

mitigationsContingencies.mitigation: Dedicated stability sprint and clear ownership

complianceSecurityPrivacy.notes: Maintain change logs and incident history
